channel.title: Life on paper.archive
channel.description: Recent content in Life on paper.archive

item.title: Blog Redesign
item.description:
Finally gave this old dev blog a facelift.

  • New design — card layout, dark mode
  • Added visitor analytics, curious which posts actually get read
  • New “Life” category

Tech posts will still be the main thing, but from now on I’ll also drop everyday records here — mostly Korean food I eat around Seoul and on trips. Think of it as a small K-food diary from a local developer.
